category_sources: source_facts.description says Kubernetes CLI to manage clusters; official GitHub repository describes K9s as a Kubernetes CLI.
display_name_sources: Official site k9scli.io and official GitHub repository use the display name K9s.
docs_sources: Official project homepage k9scli.io hosts documentation topics; official GitHub README links to k9scli.io for configuration and usage topics.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/derailed/k9s, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Kubernetes CLI cluster management; source_facts.executables lists k9s; official docs cover topics such as aliases, skins, plugins, and port forwards for the terminal UI.
